text.title: Testing with Assistive Technology Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Testing with Assistive Technology end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: inventory-ats
step.action: List AT + version + device + OS per rig; freeze versions.

step.name: matrix
step.action: Build AT × flow matrix; pick ≥2 ATs per critical flow.

step.name: run-and-record
step.action: Run each cell; capture recording or Guidepup transcript.
step.decision-gate: If recording missing, REJECT the cell as a finding source.

step.name: map-and-tag
step.action: Tag each finding with WCAG SC; classify severity per `a11y-testing` enum.

step.name: publish-and-archive
step.action: Validate with the script; archive recordings; push findings to audit-tracker.
